title: Day in the Life: Bucknell Men's Basketball Coach John Griffin
body: As someone who grew up nearby, Bucknell is a hidden gem. Great community of people in the middle of nowhere in PA 😂
author: @fredred5037

title: Day in the Life: Bucknell Men's Basketball Coach John Griffin
body: A great video, Coach. Just wish I would have been there had there not a conflict with my grandkid's lacrosse games. I'm excited that you are back, especially since I had a chance to meet and talk with you when I was still coaching at Selinsgrove and had a chance to sit in on some of your practices. Loved your energy, encouragement,, intensity, and the competitive expectations you expected and achieved with your players. As one who coached high school basketball for close to 40 years and an avid Bison supporter, I'm really excited about your return as I know countless others are as well. Here's wishing you the best as a new era in Bucknell basketball begins!  RAY BUCKNELL!.
author: @ralphvarner483
